chunks.text: ORDER-SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Constt. Petition No. D- 1174 of 2012. Date of hearing Order with signature of Judg 23.02.2022. 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. Mr. Habibullah G. Ghouri, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Additional Advocate General. ~~~~~~~ It is contended by learned counsel for the petitioners that they have been appointed legally and now are being removed from their service by the respondents without lawful justification, therefore, they be restrained from doing so. Learned Addl.A.G while making reference to comments filed on behalf of District Education Officer Primary M/F, Dadu, has sought for dismissal of the instant constitutional petition by contending that the appointment orders of the petitioners are fake, fabricated and managed. We have considered the above arguments and perused the record. The appointment of the petitioners being legal or their appointment orders being fake or otherwise, is involving factual controversy, which could not be resolved by this Court in exercise of its constitutional jurisdiction. Consequently, the instant constitutional petition being misconceived is dismissed accordingly. Judge Judge
